fixture: 060_insert_shape

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(12))
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (id, code) VALUES (1)
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42601] at 1:32 (offset 31): INSERT row has 1 values for 2 target columns

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (id, code) VALUES (1, 'x')
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (id) SELECT 1, 2
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42601] at 1:26 (offset 25): INSERT query returns 2 columns for 1 target columns

statement 5:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (id, code) SELECT 1
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42601] at 1:32 (offset 31): INSERT query returns 1 columns for 2 target columns
